Class PhysicsUtils

java.lang.Object
game.PhysicsUtils
public class PhysicsUtils extends Object
Stateless utility class for physics calculations used by Controller. All methods are static; this class is not meant to be instantiated.

    static double
    calculatePerfectAngle(boolean player1Turn, double launchOff, double targetOff)
    Brute-force searches for the launch angle (in 0.1° steps) that lands the projectile within HIT_TOLERANCE pixels of the opponent's hitbox centre.
    static double

    Calculates the cosine-based horizontal displacement for the wind-affected player.

  • Constructor Details

    • PhysicsUtils

      public PhysicsUtils()

  • Method Details

    • calculatePerfectAngle

      public static double calculatePerfectAngle(boolean player1Turn, double launchOff, double targetOff)
      Brute-force searches for the launch angle (in 0.1° steps) that lands the projectile within HIT_TOLERANCE pixels of the opponent's hitbox centre.
      Parameters:
      player1Turn - true if P1 is shooting
      launchOff - horizontal offset applied to the shooter's start X
      targetOff - horizontal offset applied to the opponent's hitbox
      Returns:
      best matching angle in degrees, or DEFAULT_PERFECT_ANGLE if none found

    • calculateWindXOffset

      public static double calculateWindXOffset(int playerNum, int windTargetPlayer, int windFrameCounter)
      Calculates the cosine-based horizontal displacement for the wind-affected player.
      Parameters:
      playerNum - the player whose offset is requested (1 or 2)
      windTargetPlayer - the player currently affected by wind (0 if none)
      windFrameCounter - frames elapsed since wind was applied
      Returns:
      pixel offset in the x-axis; 0 if the player is not wind-affected
